name: lifeops-board
description: LifeOps Board — iCloud-backed weekly schedule board with a Node CLI and iPhone-readable static HTML output.
author: jihongleejihong

plugins.name: lifeops-board
plugins.description: Initialize an iCloud-backed LifeOps schedule root, interpret conversational schedules into schedule.json, and render static output/latest.html from a bundled HTML template. Use when the user wants to register schedules, tasks, routines, behavior-change goals, or maintain an iPhone-readable local HTML LifeOps board.
